---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a concrete change to `autogap`, tied to a real gap you've hit.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What gap in `autogap` are you trying to close?

<!-- Name the concrete limitation, not the feature. "autogap misclassifies Jupyter-heavy folders as code when they're research" is a gap. "Add Jupyter support" is a feature. -->

## Concrete example

<!-- The project type, a real diagnosis run, the output, and where it went wrong. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- One or two sentences. Longer proposals go in a discussion before an issue. -->

## Why not a different approach

<!-- We reject speculative scope expansion. Tell us which simpler alternative you considered and ruled out. -->

## Impact if we don't fix this

<!-- What breaks / is worse / is missing. Include how often you hit it. -->
